titles.title: This Is the Air That I Breath

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This is the air I breathe This is the air I breathe Your holy presence living in me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This is my daily bread This is my daily bread Your very word spoken to me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And I I'm desperate for you And I I'm lost without you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And I I'm lost without you And I I'm desperate for you

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And I I'm lost without you I'm lost without you I'm lost without you

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I'm desperate for you I'm desperate for you I'm desperate for you

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I'm lost without you I'm desperate for you I'm desperate for you I'm lost without you I'm lost without you I'm lost without you I'm lost without you I'm desperate for you
